Types

Accessor = object
  bufferView*: int
  byteOffset*, count*: int
  componentType*: GLenum
  kind*: AccessorKind
  normalized*: bool
  sparse*: SparseInfo
Source   Edit   
AccessorKind = enum
  atSCALAR, atVEC2, atVEC3, atVEC4, atMAT2, atMAT3, atMAT4
Source   Edit   
BufferView = object
  buffer*: int
  byteOffset*, byteLength*, byteStride*: int
Source   Edit   
MaterialInfo = object
  name*: string
  pbrMetallicRoughness*: PbrMetallicRoughness
  normalTexture*: MaterialTexture
  occlusionTexture*: MaterialTexture
  emissiveTexture*: MaterialTexture
  emissiveFactor*: Color
  alphaMode*: string
  alphaCutoff*: float32
  doubleSided*: bool
  transmissionFactor*: float32
Source   Edit   
MaterialTexture = object
  index*: int
  texCoord*: int
  offset*: Vec2
  uvScale*: Vec2
  rotation*: float32
  scale*: float32
  strength*: float32
Source   Edit   
MeshInfo = object
  name*: string
  primitives*: seq[int]
Source   Edit   
PbrMetallicRoughness = object
  baseColorTexture*: MaterialTexture
  baseColorFactor*: Color
  metallicRoughnessTexture*: MaterialTexture
  metallicFactor*: float32
  roughnessFactor*: float32
Source   Edit   
PrimitiveAttributes = object
  position*, normal*, color0*, texcoord0*: int
  joints0*, weights0*: int
Source   Edit   
PrimitiveInfo = object
  attributes*: PrimitiveAttributes
  indices*, material*: int
  mode*: GLenum
Source   Edit   
Sampler = object
  magFilter*, minFilter*, wrapS*, wrapT*: GLint
Source   Edit   
SkinInfo = object
  name*: string
  inverseBindMatrices*: int
  skeleton*: int
  joints*: seq[int]
Source   Edit   
SparseIndices = object
  bufferView*: int
  byteOffset*: int
  componentType*: GLenum
Source   Edit   
SparseInfo = object
  count*: int
  indices*: SparseIndices
  values*: SparseValues
  used*: bool
Source   Edit   
SparseValues = object
  bufferView*: int
  byteOffset*: int
Source   Edit   
Texture = object

  sampler*: int
